title: couepia paraensis subsp. paraensis
intro: Couepia paraensis subsp. paraensis, also known as the Para Couepia, is a species of plant in the family Chrysobalanaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Couepia paraensis subsp. paraensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Couepia paraensis subsp. paraensis are typically made by infusing the bark or leaves in water, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat various health conditions.
